items.title: Wall Street Bulls Look Optimistic About Caterpillar (CAT): Should You Buy?
items.description: The average brokerage recommendation (ABR) for Caterpillar (CAT) is equivalent to a Buy. The overly optimistic recommendations of Wall Street analysts make the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric questionable. So, is it worth buying the stock?

items.title: Caterpillar: Tariffs Continue To Wreak Havoc On Profitability
items.description: Caterpillar's revenue declines are slowing, with Q2 top line beating expectations and Q3 guidance pointing to a return to growth. Click here to read more.

items.title: Can Deere Maintain Its Dividend Yield Edge Amid Industry Weakness?
items.description: DE continues steady dividend growth and strong shareholder returns, even as sales and earnings face pressure in fiscal 2025.

items.title: Meta AI Spending Spree Set to Top $600 Billion Over 3 Years. Which Stocks Will Get a Boost.
items.description: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg said it was “quite possible” his company could invest more than a planned $600 billion in the U.S. through 2028. Watch these stocks.

items.title: 10 Industrials Stocks Whale Activity In Today's Session
